system_prompt:
Click at a screen position. Supports left/right/middle button, single/double/triple click, and click-and-drag operations.

CONTEXT: You may receive: userDetails (name, language), location, timezone, and messages. Use these to personalize responses when relevant.

few_shot_examples.output: Clicked at position (500, 300) with left button
Error: coordinates (-10, 50) are out of screen bounds
